entries.text: mild pain around three out of ten, more of an ache
aliases: injury feels 3/10 pain
joint feels a bit sore but I can train
slight ache in the muscle during warmup
knee is a little tender today
entries.cue: Mild pain reported: load drops 30% and effort caps at RPE 7. Pain-free range only.

guardrail.follow_up: Does the pain worsen as the set progresses?

entries.text: moderate pain around five or six out of ten during the movement
aliases: it hurts about 5/10 when I lift
painful through the middle of the range
shoulder pain is making the press uncomfortable
entries.cue: Moderate pain: this movement is done for today. Substitute a pain-free pattern at half load.

guardrail.follow_up: Is the pain sharp and localized, or a broad dull ache?

entries.text: sharp stabbing pain, sudden and severe
aliases: felt a sharp pop during the set
stabbing pain eight out of ten
something tweaked and now it really hurts
shooting pain down my arm or leg
entries.cue: Sharp or radiating pain ends the session now. Unload the bar. Reassess in 48 hours.

guardrail.follow_up: Is there swelling, numbness, or loss of range right now?

entries.text: feeling sick, feverish, sore throat or chills
aliases: I think I am coming down with something
fever and body aches today
really congested and run down
entries.cue: Systemic symptoms: no training today. A fever and tonnage do not mix.

guardrail.follow_up: Any fever above 38C in the last 24 hours?

aliases: feeling faint when I stand up from the bench
vision went spotty after the last set
lightheaded and shaky
entries.cue: Dizziness ends the session. Sit down, hydrate, eat. Do not load a spine while lightheaded.

guardrail.follow_up: Have you eaten and had fluids in the last three hours?

entries.text: everything feels unusually heavy today, bar speed is slow
aliases: warmup weights feel like maxes
no pop today, bar is crawling
legs are dead from yesterday
entries.cue: Bar speed is the readout: cut load 15% and stop every set two reps short.

guardrail.follow_up: Is the slowness even across movements, or one lift only?

aliases: got maybe four hours of sleep
up all night, running on nothing
terrible night with the kids awake
entries.cue: Acute sleep debt: keep the pattern, drop 10%, cap RPE 7.5. Stimulus today, PRs another day.

entries.text: very sore muscles from the last session, normal soreness
aliases: quads are wrecked from squats
DOMS is brutal today
hamstrings still sore from deadlifts
entries.cue: DOMS is not damage: full warmup, first work set at 90%, build only if movement quality holds.

guardrail.follow_up: Does the soreness ease as you warm up?

entries.text: form is breaking down, losing position under the bar
aliases: lower back rounding on the pull
knees caving on the way up
losing the brace halfway through the set
entries.cue: Position beats load: drop 10% and end every set the rep before form breaks.

guardrail.follow_up: Does the breakdown appear on rep one or only late in the set?

entries.text: feeling strong and fresh today, weights are moving fast
aliases: feeling great, bar speed is flying
best I have felt in weeks
everything feels light today
entries.cue: Good day confirmed. The plan already accounts for readiness; execute it with intent.

entries.text: training in a hotel gym with limited equipment
aliases: only dumbbells available today
no rack here, improvising
travelling with minimal kit
entries.cue: Match the pattern, not the implement: higher reps, RPE cap 8, keep daily tonnage near plan.

entries.text: chest pain or pressure during exertion
aliases: tightness in my chest on the heavy set
chest feels heavy and strange
pressure in chest and short of breath
entries.cue: Chest symptoms under load: stop immediately. This is outside training; seek medical assessment.
